case_title: SOMA STORAGE, LP, DBA SOMA SELF STORAGE VS. MICHAEL DAILEY et al
cause_of_action: OTHER NON EXEMPT COMPLAINTS (to foreclose lien on personal property)

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT DAILEY, MICHAEL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOMA STORAGE, LP, DBA SOMA SELF STORAGE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAILEY, MICHAEL $911.88 PRINCIPAL, $185.60 COSTS, $210.65 DAILY STORAGE DAMAGES ($3.83/DAY), TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,308.13, AND FORECLOSURE OF THE PLAINTIFF'S LIEN AS FOLLOWS: THAT UNLESS THE TOTAL SUM SET FORTH ABOVE BE PAID BY DEFENDANT WITHIN 10 DAYS OF THE ENTRY OF JUDGMENT HEREIN, THE PROPERTY MAY BE SOLD FOR PAYMENT OF THE LIEN AND THAT THE LIEN BE PAID FROM THE PROCEEDS OF THE SALE PURSUANT TO CALIF. B&P 21710(D).
